text.title: Design Doc Advanced Patterns Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Design Doc Advanced Patterns.

example.scenario: A multi-service refactor that touches auth: triggers fire for cross-system + security. Sequence diagram names all five services; capacity block cites a load test at 1.2k RPS p95 < 80ms; failure-mode table lists 7 modes with MTTR 5-45 min; migration playbook gives a 30-min rollback budget aligned to the ops SLO.
example.trace: r1-trigger-block-mandatory → r2-sequence-diagram-named-actors → r3-capacity-numbers-sourced → r5-migration-rollback-budget → artefact green
